{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "ClearSCADA is a purpose-built SCADA/telemetry management platform that sits above field devices and RTUs in industrial control systems; it functions as an orchestration layer for industrial IoT deployments, so the vulnerability affects an active IoT element at the application layer.",
  "category": "controller/scada",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "The vulnerability affects firmware of a Foscam C1 Indoor HD IP camera, which is a purpose-built smart device operating autonomously on a network; the issue lies in its embedded software, fitting the device layer of the IoT ecosystem.",
  "category": "cameras",
  "sector": "consumer iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Honeywell Experion PKS is a purpose-built distributed control system used in industrial automation. It is an active element of an industrial IoT deployment, and the buffer-overflow issues are in its software modules, i.e., the orchestration/application layer rather than generic IT infrastructure.",
  "category": "industrial control system",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Suprema BioStar 2 is specialized access-control management software that communicates with biometric door controllers/readers. It is a purpose-built orchestration platform for IoT devices and therefore part of the IoT ecosystem. The path-traversal flaw resides in this application layer component.",
  "category": "access control",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Bosch IP Helper is specialized software used to discover/configure Bosch IP cameras, which are IoT devices; thus the product is purpose-built for and actively participates in an IoT deployment, fitting the application layer. The vulnerability is in this IoT-specific management application, not in general-purpose software.",
  "category": "cameras",
  "sector": "smart cities iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "GE Proficy HMI/SCADA CIMPLICITY is specialized industrial control software that supervises and controls field devices in industrial environments, making it a functional element of an industrial IoT system. The vulnerability is in its web server component, placing it in the application layer.",
  "category": "scada/hmi",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Schneider Electric EcoStruxure Power Monitoring Expert / Energy Expert / Power SCADA Operation are purpose-built industrial IoT platforms that collect data from power meters and control equipment; they provide user-facing services in an IoT system. The URL-redirection flaw lies in the software layer of these platforms, making it an application-layer IoT vulnerability.",
  "category": "scada",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "B. Braun SpaceCom2 is a medical communication module embedded in infusion pump systems; it is a purpose-built IoT device operating in healthcare environments. The flaw lies in the device’s firmware (absence of cryptographic signatures), placing it in the device layer of the IoT ecosystem.",
  "category": "actuators",
  "sector": "healthcare iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",

  "sector": "other"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",

  "category": "sensors",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",

  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",

{
  "label": "IoT",

  "sector": "consumer iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",

}

{

{

This is clearly an IoT-specific technology and the issue lies in protocol/stack handling, placing it in the communication layer.",

}

}
